location_perm.title: Enable location
location_perm.description: Allow location access so we can show the nearest mechanics and workshops around you.
location_perm.privacy: Your location is used only to find the closest mechanics and is never shared with third parties.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.intro: Find answers to common questions. Can't find what you need? Contact us.

how_quick_request.a: Describe your problem in one tap — the system finds the nearest available mechanic within 30 seconds and shows price and ETA.

who_master.a: All mechanics are verified: documents, experience, reviews from real customers. We only show certified workshops.

price_calc.a: Price is fixed before work starts. The mechanic sees your problem and location and gives a flat rate. No hidden fees.

cancel_request.a: Yes — free of charge before the mechanic arrives. After arrival, a call-out fee may apply (shown in the request).

contact_master.q: How do I contact the mechanic?
contact_master.a: Once your request is accepted, chat and call buttons appear. Contact stays available until job completion.

safety.a: All payments go through secure escrow. Funds are released to the mechanic only after you confirm the work is done.

payment.a: Card, Apple Pay or Google Pay in the app. No need to hand cash to the mechanic.

reviews.q: How do I leave a review?
reviews.a: After job completion you'll get a notification. Rate the mechanic 1–5 stars and add a short comment.

support.title: Contact Support
support.intro: Describe your issue — we reply within 24 hours.
support.sent_body: Message sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
support.eta_note: Average reply time — 4 hours on business days.

about.title: About
about.tagline: AutoService is a next-gen auto-service marketplace. Find a verified mechanic in a minute.
about.what_we_do_body: We connect drivers with certified workshops and mobile mechanics. Flat rates, real ETA, transparent reviews.
about.cities_body: Currently live in Berlin (Germany) and Kyiv (Ukraine). Coming soon: Hamburg, Munich, Lviv.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of AutoService. By creating an account, you accept these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: By using the app, you confirm you've read and agree to these Terms. If not — please don't use the service.

service_description.title: Service description
service_description.body: AutoService is a marketplace connecting clients and workshops. We don't perform repairs — mechanics work as independent contractors.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: An account is required. You're responsible for password security. One person — one account.

user_obligations.title: User obligations
user_obligations.body: Don't use the service for illegal purposes. Don't abuse mechanics or other users. Provide accurate information.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Payments via secure escrow. Platform fee — 10% of order value, charged to the mechanic.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.body: Free before arrival. After arrival, a call-out fee may apply per the mechanic's tariff.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Work quality is the mechanic's responsibility. The platform isn't directly liable for outcomes but mediates disputes.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update Terms. Material changes — 30 days notice via push and email.

governing_law.title: Governing law
governing_law.body: Disputes are resolved under the law of the registration country (Germany for DE region, Ukraine for UA region).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take your data seriously. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it and what your rights are.

data_we_collect.title: Data we collect
data_we_collect.body: Contact details (email, phone), location (only while the app is open), order history, reviews.

how_we_use.title: How we use
how_we_use.body: To match nearby mechanics, calculate price, process payments, communicate about orders and improve the service.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Mechanics receive only the minimum: your name, location (for the meet) and problem description. Contact opens after the request is accepted.

storage.title: Storage
storage.body: Data is stored in secure EU data centres (GDPR-compliant). Order history — 3 years, then anonymised.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can request a copy, correction, account deletion. Email privacy@autoservice.com.

cookies.title: Cookies & tracking
cookies.body: We use technical cookies for service operation. Analytics is anonymous — no data sold to advertisers.

children.title: Children
children.body: The service isn't intended for users under 18. We don't collect children's data.

changes.title: Policy changes
changes.body: We'll notify of material changes in advance via push and email.
